rank_math_title: Leo November 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Leo November 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Carnelian). New Moon Nov 8 in Scorpio (home); Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (community, friends); Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 IN YOUR SIGN (Leo).
content:
Leo November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeTend the roots, claim the spotlight
Key DatesVenus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 4th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 IN YOUR SIGN (Leo 25°53') / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (11th house)
LoveMars conjunct Jupiter in your sign is one of 2026's loudest personal-confidence and romance moments
Career11th house Beaver Full Moon is one of 2026's biggest community and collective-vision moments — and Mars in your sign amplifies your leadership
Crystal of the MonthCarnelian
Lucky ColorsWarm orange, sunset gold, fiery amber
Lucky Number1
AffirmationI tend the roots; I claim the spotlight they carry me to.

This Month's Energy

Leo, November 2026 is a once-every-two-years peak — Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October's retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 4th house of home, family, and inner foundation — a fresh start at the roots. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo, your own sign, your 1st house of identity and body — one of 2026's most powerful personal-confidence, vitality, and visibility moments. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision — a collective climax. November's pattern: tend the roots early, claim the spotlight late.

Key Dates for Leo in November 2026

DateTransitMeaning for LeoDo / Avoid
Nov 8New Moon in Scorpio4th house — fresh start in home, family, inner foundation; commit to the roots before the spotlight peaksDo: organize the home, mend the family tie, set the foundation
Avoid: spreading across too many public commitments before the roots are settled
Nov 13Venus + Mercury station directStation day — the retrograde season ends; the Sun is your ruler, but clarity returns to home and partnership mattersDo: move forward on what's been waiting, sign the home agreement
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' LEO (your 1st house — your sign)1st house — Mars and Jupiter together in Leo; one of 2026's most powerful personal-confidence, vitality, visibility, and leadership momentsDo: claim the spotlight, ship the personal project, lead, declare the next chapter
Avoid: playing small or letting modesty hold back a once-every-two-years peak
Nov 24Beaver Full Moon in Gemini11th house — climax around community, friends, collective vision, long-term dreams; a long-building group role or friendship reaches a turning pointDo: claim the role in the group, name the dream, mend the friendship, lead the circle
Avoid: holding onto a circle that no longer fits
Nov 22Sun enters Sagittarius5th house season — romance, creativity, play, children through late December (your fire-sign cousin's season)Do: make the art, go on the date, schedule the play
Avoid: postponing joy
Early NovMars moves through Leo (your 1st)Identity, body, vitality, leadership stay action zones; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the personal momentumDo: move the body, ship the personal project, claim the role
Avoid: spreading across too many identity claims at once

Career & Money

For Leo, November's career story peaks at Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign. The November 16 conjunction is one of 2026's clearest "step forward and lead" moments — claim the spotlight, ship the personal project, declare the role.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 4th house) handles the foundation — work-from-home arrangements, the inner infrastructure. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 5th house of creativity) on November 22 opens a creative season. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 11th house) brings a community or collective role to a climax. Crystals for wealth can support the leadership; the practical move is tend the roots early, claim the spotlight late.

Love & Relationships

The Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign on November 16 is the love signature of the month — and Leo loves nothing more than to be seen. This is one of 2026's loudest personal-confidence and romance moments. After October's Venus retrograde review, this is the green light to lead with the heart.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 4th house) tends the home-rooted bond. Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the family and romance review. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 5th house of romance) on November 22 opens a playful season. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is tending the roots so the spotlight doesn't burn out.

Health & Wellness

November's wellness story emphasizes the heart, upper back, and vital energy. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign on November 16 amps the body's vitality — Leo carries this through the heart, upper back, and chest. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 4th house) asks for home-based rest first.

Carnelian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with vitality, courage, grounded creativity, and the sacral energy — a useful symbolic companion for a Sun-ruled fire sign at a once-every-two-years peak. Leo often carries tension in the heart, upper back, and chest; heart-opening yoga, warm food, and playful rest are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Carnelian

Why Carnelian fits Leo this month. You are Sun-ruled — your natural state is radiance. November amplifies that to a once-every-two-years peak: Mars conjunct Jupiter in your own sign. Carnelian — with its warm orange-red — is traditionally tied to vitality, courage, grounded creativity, and the sacral fire. Where Tiger's Eye would focus and Sunstone would lift, Carnelian ignites. Perfect for the 4th house Scorpio New Moon (tend the roots) and the 11th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the spotlight).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Carnelian at your sacral or solar plexus on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during the Mars-Jupiter peak in your sign around November 16.

Best date to use it: November 16, the Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign — hold Carnelian at your sacral or heart for 5 minutes at the conjunction's exact hour, naming the spotlight you're claiming.

Read more: Carnelian Meaning and Best Crystals for Leo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Leo — November 2026

When: November 16, the Mars conjunct Jupiter in your sign.
Crystal: Carnelian.
Intention: Tend the roots; claim the spotlight they carry.

  1. Cleanse Carnelian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Let it sit at your sacral or solar plexus through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Mars-Jupiter peak (November 8–16): write down three roots you're tending — and the spotlight you're claiming at November 16.
  3. Act at the Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16: claim the role, ship the personal project, lead. Carnelian at your sacral during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24: how has the spotlight clarified the circle? Hold Carnelian during the review.

Shop Leo Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with courage, vitality, leadership, and creative confidence — including the Carnelian that ignites the Leo fire at a Mars-Jupiter peak in your sign. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Leo November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Leo?

It's a once-every-two-years peak. Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 falls in your own sign — one of 2026's most powerful personal-confidence, vitality, and visibility moments. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 4th house) tends the roots. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 11th house) is a community climax.

How will the Mars conjunct Jupiter in my sign affect Leo on November 16?

Mars and Jupiter together in Leo is a once-every-two-years amplification of personal confidence, vitality, leadership, and visibility. Claim the spotlight; ship the personal project; lead. This is the year's loudest green light for Leo.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Leo?

It falls in your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision — a climax around a long-building group role or friendship. Claim your place in the circle; mend the friendship; lead the dream.

What is the best crystal for Leo in November 2026?

Carnelian — it ignites the Leo fire at a Mars-Jupiter peak, exactly what a 4th house Scorpio New Moon (tend the roots) plus an 11th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the spotlight) demand. See the full Leo crystal guide →

Why does the Scorpio New Moon on November 8 ask Leo to tend the roots first?

The Scorpio New Moon falls in your 4th house of home and family — the foundation. Before the Mars-Jupiter spotlight peaks on November 16, the roots need attention. Tend the home; mend the family tie; the spotlight is sustainable only when the foundation holds.
